commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And when I looked, behold, a hand was sent unto me; and, lo, a scroll of a book was in it; Without. This was only done when the work was long. (Calmet) Scriptus et in tergo, necdum finitus Orestes. ) Septuagint, "past and present things were written in it. "(Haydock) Woe, or the words of the penitent, of the blessed, and of the damned. (Worthington) The canticles were of a mournful nature, and the prophet had sorrows to announce.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
